name: Chase Freedom Flex®

welcome_offer.description: $200 cash back (20,000 points) after spending $500 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on up to $1,500 in combined purchases per quarter (must activate each quarter). After cap, earn 1%.
5% cash back on travel purchased through Chase Travel
3% cash back at restaurants including takeout and delivery
1% cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Cell Phone Protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $1,000 per year in cell phone protection (subject to $100 deductible) when paying bills with the card

other_benefits.name: DashPass
other_benefits.description: Complimentary 6 months of DashPass (then $12.99/month) — activated by 12/31/2027

other_benefits.name: Trip Interruption/Cancellation
other_benefits.description: Up to $1,500 per person and $6,000 per trip for trip interruption/cancellation when travel is booked with the card

notes: One of Chase's most popular no-AF cards. The rotating 5% categories require activation each quarter. Often has gas/grocery/wholesale in Q2. Can be powerful when combined with Chase Sapphire Preferred/Reserve for 1.5x/3x point transfer. Note: earning is 'cash back' but tracked as Ultimate Rewards points.
